abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Twinned Soul (Lilitu)
abilities.text: When this model gains a Glutted token, a friendly Lilitu may gain a Glutted token.

triggers.name: Baying Hounds
triggers.text: Summon a Corrupted Hound within 2" of this model.

triggers.name: Drink Blood
triggers.text: When resolving, this model heals an amount equal to the damage suffered by the target.

triggers.name: Bloody Trophy
triggers.text: This model gains a Glutted token.

actions.name: Release the Hounds
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a Glutted token. If it does so, this action receives a (fortitude).
actions.effects: Summon a Corrupted Hound within 2" of this model.

actions.name: Chase Them Down
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Once per activation. Target moves up to 4".

triggers.name: Bloody Example
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (aura)1" of the target, then deal 1 damage to the target.
